question: Considering the area chart of revenue by year, which statement is best supported by the data shown?

options.A: Revenue in 2021 and 2022 appears to reach the same level on the chart.
options.B: Revenue in 2018 was higher than in 2020.
options.C: Revenue declined in each year shown.
options.D: Revenue in 2018 and 2019 appears to be identical.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
